programme.title: Karikal Mahal: A Silent Witness
programme.desc: (Live) Spotlight on East Asia, a region steeped in history and now helping to write the future of our world. We'll break down the key stories and explain why they matter.

programme.title: East Asia Tonight
programme.desc: Once a symbol of splendour, Karikal Mahal saw ruin as Moona Kader Sultan fell from grace. Revived by the Malayan Magic Circle's dazzling performances, its magic disappeared with the onset of WWII.

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes on a job as a night guard. As the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at the abandoned building, only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Det. Walter Edmond responds to a homicide where a woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds, and a couple at the scene leads him to a suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a desperate woman needs to poop during a traffic stop; a mom is busted sneaking into a school dressed as her daughter; and more!

programme.desc: Scott Perala takes down a career criminal, while FBI Agent, Robert Wittman, investigates a man pretending to be a sheikh selling fake artwork.

programme.desc: A historic Texan town is stunned when a popular caretaker is found dead and a beloved resident goes missing. But with support from a concerned community, detectives uncover the secrets that led to murder.

programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Aaron Campbell didn't admit his crimes until after his conviction. He abducted six-year-old neighbour Alesha MacPhailand, carried her to a nearby wood, and raped and murdered her.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: The Alexander family looks to Lay Lay to cast the deciding vote on family decisions, but the newfound power goes to her head, and one ruling causes a rift between her and Sadie.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes to extreme lengths to trick Gary into going to the vet. // SpongeBob become desperate when he accidentally gets pinned under his exercise equipment and must wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick spawns an adorable mini-Patrick who quickly becomes the star of the show (until he outgrows the role). // The Star family celebrates the Klopnodian holiday Swaptoberfest by swapping identities with each other.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick ventures inside Cecil to learn how the body works.

programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space. // Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and "correct the record.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that’s hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: The Alexander family looks to Lay Lay to cast the deciding vote on family decisions, but the newfound power goes to her head, and one ruling causes a rift between her and Sadie.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry and Ray have to deal with an especially annoying new villain, the Spoiler. Piper is pushed to her limits as she tries to join a popular Captain Man fan club.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Whaaaat?!? Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole?!? Charlotte and Jasper better go help, 'cuz Schwoz is takin' a bean bath!

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When Danger Force is challenged to compete in Swellview's Street Fightin' Championship, they must master the ancient art of street fighting and battle for their honor...without using their superpowers.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The Dingo channel has apparently been stealing ideas from iCarly, so Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to the Dingo studio to give the writers a piece of their mind.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat notice everyone, including their friends, are becoming obsessed with a new phone game, 'Brain Crush.' The game distracts the audience at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: With all his family and friends under Kitsune's mind control, Raph no longer wants to fight in the Mutant Battle Arena. But he'll have to (with Pigeon Pete's help) in order to save EVERYONE he loves before it's too late!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The Mutanimals turn on the Ninja Turtles after Ray Fillet accuses them of attacking him in Central Park! The Turtles realize a mutant snapping turtle named Tokka is on the loose, drawing Donnie to a terrifying laboratory on Staten Island!

programme.desc: SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town. // Karen looks after Spot while Plankton goes out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected. // SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Sharing isn't easy for the twins and after a particularly heated argument they decide split the treehouse in half. // In order to win a local gardening competition, Best attempts to grow a plant, and Bester decides to be a plant.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Bester's new pet comes between her and her brother. There's nothing to it, Best must splat the cockroach! // Best and Bester go on an epic quest for a talking whale to prove they answered a board game question correctly.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family's pet toilet Tinkle has eleven toilet puppies. // Mistaking it for the local park, the Star family splits up at a cemetery to enjoy their favorite picnic activities.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The tiny futuristic city of Shmandor exacts revenge on Patrick Star. // Patrick and Squidina go on location to interview their neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans out the boating school lighthouse, where he finds a cute but inconvenient companion. // No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs & his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When a mysterious new barber attacks Swellview with a string of terrible haircuts, it's up to Danger Force to uncover their identity before their own hair gets chopped

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry is not invited to a birthday party because he is accused of throwing the birthday girl off the roof the previous year. Captain Man agrees to help Henry clear his name.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To avoid his responsibilities, Lincoln uses Lisa's hologram device to make it appear like he's doing all of his tasks. // With Mom busy at work, the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lisa discovers the only way to stop Lily's nightmares is to go inside her dreams and fight them herself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Lady Upturn introduces Squidward, and his musical "talents", to her high society friends after she becomes his patron. // Squidward sets out to prove that aliens aren't real...until he has a close encounter of his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing. // When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward's amazing new life in witness protection is threatened after SpongeBob and Patrick discover his whereabouts.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick helps Squidward with his newspaper delivery job to compensate for injuring him. // In the midst of a typical day of scavenging, the Dartfish family discovers a thief in the Star home.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: When Squidina is bedridden, Patrick has to run his show without her.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. // Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that "imitation is the sincerest form of flattery" - too bad no one told him how to stop! // When worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, it's up to him to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max pretends to turn evil to infiltrate Mastermind's henchmen and steal the Chip-Chucker, a device that previously turned him evil.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote control car, they throw a manicure/pedicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Para sa Isa't Isa ep 9
programme.desc: Zion gets another shot at repairing his relationship with his wife, Erin by a wish on a well to go back in time. But he finds Erin not knowing him at all. He must now correct his mistakes and make her fall in love with him again.
